extName.description: Extension name shown in Chrome and on the Web Store.

extDescription.message: Watches your Claude.ai usage and pings you with a native OS notification the moment your message limit resets.
extDescription.description: Extension description shown in Chrome and on the Web Store.

popupSubtitle.message: We'll ping you the moment your quota refills.

statusIdle.description: Status when no alarm is set.

statusArmed.description: Status when an alarm is active.

emptyHint.message: When Claude shows a usage-limit notice, the extension grabs the reset time and arms the alarm automatically. You can also enter a time manually below.
emptyHint.description: Hint text shown when no alarm is currently set.

privacy.message: All processing happens on your machine. This extension never transmits your page text or alarm time to any remote server.
privacy.description: Privacy disclaimer at the bottom of the popup.

alarmTimeLabel.description: Label that displays when the alarm will fire.

rescanScanning.description: Shown on the rescan button while detection is in progress.

rescanOpenedUsage.description: Shown when no time was captured on the current tab and the extension opened claude.ai/settings/usage.

testHelpHint.message:
If nothing appears within a few seconds, check:
• macOS: System Settings → Notifications → Google Chrome
• Windows: Settings → System → Notifications → Google Chrome
• Whether system Focus / Do Not Disturb is on

testDeniedHint.message:
Chrome has muted notifications for this extension.
Open chrome://settings/content/notifications and make sure "Claude Cooldown Reminder" is not in the Block list.

notifMsgTest.message: If you see this, the notification channel is working.
